children.text: We’re looking for the profiles you’ve crossed paths with
Hang in there, you’ll find other members soon!
Let happners that you cross paths with know what you feel like doing and meet the right person at the right place at the right time.
Welcome, Like your first profile! It will stay between us.
Charm someone you'd like to chat with!

Welcome to happn,

When you cross paths with someone you like:

1. You can “Like” (the heart button) them secretly and they will never know…Unless it’s mutual!

2. You can also “Say Hi” to let them know you’re interested. It sends a notification and costs 1 credit.

3. If you both fancy each other you can start a conversation.

For more information, you can check out our FAQ directly from the app.

Now, enjoy! 

happn Olivia
